title: Integrated Mekanism
description: Compatability mod between Mekanism and the Integrated Dynamics mods
body:
This requires the Cyclops Core library and Integrated Dynamics!

Come talk to us in #integratedmods on the Cyclops Discord server!

 

Welcome to the future of high-tech machinery automation!
This mod adds compatibility between Mekanism and Integrated Dynamics (+addons), and allows you to:

  • Read and operate on the contents of chemical tanks (gases, infusion, pigment, slurry) and Mekanism machines (e.g. Fission Reactor).
  • Transfer chemicals across Integrated Tunnels exporters and importers.
  • Manage all chemicals in your network using Integrated Terminals (including JEI support).
  • Autocraft with chemicals, items, and fluids using Integrated Crafting.
  • Perform advanced operations with chemicals using Integrated Scripting and Integrated REST.
  • ...

Support for Integrated Dynamics addons (Tunnels, Terminals, ...) is optional, and will only be activated when the addons are installed. Only Integrated Dynamics and Mekanism are required for this mod to work.

Just like all other Integrated Dynamics mods, this mod is highly configurable, and for example allows you to configure whether or not radioactive chemicals can be transferred across the network.

This mod provides in-game documentation and tutorials through the 'On the Dynamics of Integration' book from Integrated Dynamics. 

Using new Chemical Interfaces, Importers, and Exporters, you can transfer chemicals across your network with fine-grained precision and logic, just like you're used to for items, fluids, and energy.

 

Chemical Readers allow you to read all details from Chemical Tanks, where Chemicals are first-class citizens in Integrated Dynamics logic you can use within many new chemical-related operators.

 

Using the Storage Terminal, you gain access to all chemicals within your network.

 

A variety of new aspects have been added to existing readers, such as the Network Reader (chemical contents), Machine Reader (Mekanism machine details), and the World Reader (radiation).

 

Autocrafting with combinations of chemicals, fluids, and items? No problem! In addition, all Mekanism machines have full recipe reading support using the Machine Reader and Attuned Crafting Interface.
